ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the trip started */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the trip start */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the trip start */,
  "base_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the taxi base */,
  "dom" INTEGER /* Day of the month */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Weekday (0=Monday, 6=Sunday) */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (24-hour format) */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver who made the trip */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle used for the trip */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger who took the trip */,
  "trip_type" TEXT /* Type of trip (e.g., airport, downtown, etc.) */,
  "trip_status" TEXT /* Status of the trip (e.g., completed, cancelled, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_base_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_id") REFERENCES bases ("base_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bases" (
  "base_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxi base */,
  "base_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxi base */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the taxi base */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the taxi base */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the taxi base */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the taxi base is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the taxi base is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the taxi base */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("base_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "base_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the taxi base the driver operates from */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the driver was hired */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_base_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_id") REFERENCES bases ("base_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "base_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the taxi base the vehicle is assigned to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_base_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_id") REFERENCES bases ("base_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trip for which the fare is recorded */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount charged for the trip */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the trip */,
  "tip" REAL /* Tip given by the passenger */,
  "tolls" REAL /* Tolls paid during the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the passenger */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip log */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trip */,
  "start_datetime" TEXT /* Start date and time of the trip */,
  "end_datetime" TEXT /* End date and time of the trip */,
  "start_latitude" REAL /* Start latitude coordinate */,
  "start_longitude" REAL /* Start longitude coordinate */,
  "end_latitude" REAL /* End latitude coordinate */,
  "end_longitude" REAL /* End longitude coordinate */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the trip */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_logs_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trip */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger (1-5) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the passenger */,
  "rating_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_ratings_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trip */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the person who reported the issue (driver or passenger) */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., traffic, accident, etc.) */,
  "issue_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_issues_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trip */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the trip */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "payment_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_payments_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip request */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger who made the request */,
  "pickup_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the trip was requested */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Pickup location of the trip */,
  "dropoff_location" TEXT /* Dropoff location of the trip */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trip request (e.g., pending, accepted, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_requests_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
